skill.name: longbridge-technical
skill.description: Technical analysis frameworks for stocks: candlestick patterns, Ichimoku cloud, indicators (RSI/MACD/EMA/Bollinger), harmonic patterns, Elliott Wave, Chan Theory, Smart Money Concepts, and Turtle Trading signals with position sizing.
skill.summary: Technical analysis frameworks — candlestick patterns, Ichimoku cloud, technical indicators (RSI/MACD/EMA/Bollinger), harmonic patterns (Gartley/Bat/Butterfly/Crab), Elliott Wave, Chan Theory (缠论 bi/zhongshu/buy-sell points), Smart Money Concepts (BOS/FVG/Order Block), and Turtle Trading signals with ATR/Unit position sizing.
skill.author: longbridge

security_audit.summary: Prompt-only documentation skill containing markdown reference files that describe technical analysis frameworks (candlestick, Ichimoku, Elliott Wave, Chan Theory, SMC, Turtle). No executable scripts or code files are shipped. All static findings are false positives: the 291 'backtick execution' hits are triple-backtick markdown code blocks containing bash/Python examples that the LLM is expected to interpret, not actually executed code. The 'weak crypto', 'system reconnaissance', and 'config library' hits are false matches on ticker symbols (SPX/HSI), CLI invocation examples, and financial documentation terms. No prompt injection, exfiltration, or malicious intent detected.

content.user_title: Analyze Stocks with Technical Analysis Frameworks
content.value_statement: Traders need consistent technical analysis across multiple frameworks but spend hours switching tools. This skill unifies candlestick, Ichimoku, Elliott Wave, Chan Theory, and Turtle Trading analysis in a single conversational workflow backed by Longbridge market data.
actual_capabilities: Identify 15 classic candlestick patterns from OHLCV data and produce composite bullish/bearish signals
Compute Ichimoku cloud metrics including tenkan/kijun cross and lagging span confirmation
Calculate technical indicators (RSI, MACD, EMA, Bollinger Bands, OBV) and produce a three-dimension vote signal
Detect harmonic patterns (Gartley, Bat, Butterfly, Crab) with Fibonacci ratio validation
Map Elliott Wave cycles with 5-wave impulse and 3-wave corrective structure analysis
Generate Turtle Trading breakout signals with ATR-based position sizing
limitations: Requires OHLCV historical data fetched via longbridge CLI or MCP — cannot work without market data access
Chan Theory and SMC modules require pip install of czsc and smartmoneyconcepts packages
Pattern detection is probabilistic — signals are analytical, not guaranteed trade outcomes
Read-only analysis tier; does not execute trades or access account data

use_cases.title: Daily Stock Pattern Scan
use_cases.description: Scan watchlist stocks for candlestick reversal patterns and Ichimoku cloud signals each morning.

use_cases.title: Elliott Wave Position Analysis
use_cases.description: Determine where a stock sits within its Elliott Wave cycle and confirm with momentum indicators.

use_cases.title: Turtle System Breakout Backtest
use_cases.description: Evaluate Turtle Trading 20/55-day breakout signals with ATR position sizing for a portfolio.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Candlestick Scan
prompt_templates.prompt: Scan NVDA.US for the latest candlestick reversal patterns and give me a composite signal.

prompt_templates.title: Ichimoku Dashboard
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the Ichimoku cloud analysis for 700.HK including tenkan/kijun cross status and price vs cloud position.

prompt_templates.title: Elliott Wave Deep Dive
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze AAPL.US Elliott Wave structure with daily and weekly kline, identify the current stage, and confirm with momentum.

prompt_templates.title: Turtle Signal With Sizing
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate Turtle Trading signals for TSLA.US with 20-day and 55-day breakout systems, include ATR and unit position sizing.

output_examples.input: Scan NVDA.US for candlestick patterns over the last 200 daily bars.
output: **Bullish Engulfing** detected on 2026-05-30 — strong reversal signal after downtrend
**Composite Signal: BULLISH** (3 bullish patterns, 1 bearish, 11 neutral)
Price above cloud (Senkou A: 275, Senkou B: 270) — uptrend intact
Chikou span above price action 26 periods ago — confirmation present

best_practices: Always fetch at least 200 daily K-lines before running any framework to ensure sufficient data
Run `longbridge kline --help` first to verify available flags and symbol format for your market
Use `--format json` on all CLI calls and redirect to temp files to avoid stdout parsing issues with version notices
anti_patterns: Do not force a wave stage label when the structure is unconfirmed — output 'Structure Unconfirmed' instead
Do not aggregate independent macro signals into a single score — each signal stands on its own
Do not use index codes (SPX, HSI) directly — Longbridge requires tracking ETF symbols like SPY.US or 2800.HK

faq.question: What markets does this skill support?
faq.answer: Hong Kong, US, A-share, and Singapore markets via the Longbridge CLI or MCP server.

faq.question: Do I need to log in to use technical analysis?
faq.answer: No. All frameworks are analytical and read-only. Public K-line data does not require authentication.

faq.question: What Python packages are required?
faq.answer: Chan Theory needs czsc (pip install czsc). Smart Money Concepts needs smartmoneyconcepts (pip install smartmoneyconcepts).

faq.question: Can this skill place trades?
faq.answer: No. This is a read-only analysis skill. It provides signals and framework interpretations only.

faq.question: How much historical data is needed?
faq.answer: At least 200 daily bars for candlestick and indicator analysis. Elliott Wave prefers 250+ daily bars and 100 weekly bars.

faq.question: What if the longbridge CLI is not installed?
faq.answer: The skill falls back to the Longbridge MCP server. If neither is available, install longbridge-terminal first.
